AUTH.LOGIN_DESCRIPTION: Real-time control of your reservations coming from the WhatsApp Business API. Confirm, cancel, and measure your restaurant's daily occupancy from a centralized dashboard.
AUTH.OWNER_HIGHLIGHT: Multi-branch financial reports and total control.
AUTH.MANAGER_HIGHLIGHT: Quick table assignment and instant approvals.
AUTH.STAFF_LOGIN_HELP: Enter the authorized credentials assigned to your restaurant to operate the panel.
AUTH.RESTAURANT_SLUG_HELP: The alphanumeric identifier that appears in your business URL.
AUTH.PASSWORD_REQUIRED: The password is required to log in.
AUTH.PASSWORD_MINLENGTH: The password must contain a minimum of 8 characters.
AUTH.LOGIN_ERROR_RECOVERABLE: If the error persists, please reset your password or check your connection status.
AUTH.VALIDATION_ERROR: One or more inputs in the form are incorrect.
AUTH.LOGIN_GENERIC_ERROR: Could not process the request on the server. Try again later.
AUTH.LOGIN_TAGLINE: Connecting Customers and Restaurants via WhatsApp
AUTH.REQUEST_RESET_SUBTITLE: Enter your restaurant's email to receive a secure reset link.
AUTH.FORGOT_PASSWORD_SUCCESS: We have sent a recovery link to your registered email address.
AUTH.FORGOT_PASSWORD_ERROR_404: We could not find any restaurant registered with that email.
AUTH.FORGOT_PASSWORD_ERROR_NETWORK: Could not connect to the server. Check your internet connection.
AUTH.FORGOT_PASSWORD_ERROR_GENERIC: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
AUTH.RESET_PASSWORD_HELP: Enter and confirm your new access password for the administrative panel.
AUTH.RESET_SUCCESS_DESCRIPTION: Your password has been successfully reset in PostgreSQL. You can now use your new credentials to log into the dashboard.
AUTH.PASSWORD_MISMATCH: The passwords entered do not match.
AUTH.RESET_ERROR_NO_TOKEN: The recovery token is not present in the URL. Please request a new link.
AUTH.RESET_ERROR_EXPIRED: The recovery token is invalid, has already been used, or has expired from the database.
